Describe the saw setup and the specific material instructions displayed on screen during the first segment.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a black circular saw mounted on plywood appears with sawdust piles; at 9s, text overlay states the tool cuts wood, metal, and concrete; at 10s, instructions to add a water hose for concrete appear; at 11s, text instructs to add a CO2 hose for metal work visible.

question: Describe the background transition and the text animation sequence shown during the second segment.
canonical_answer: At 14s, light brown wooden floorboards with scattered sawdust become visible; at 15s, text asking if one saw cuts wood, concrete, and metal fades in from a blur; at 16s, the bold black text listing materials remains centered; at 17s, the text overlays disappear from the wooden background completely.
